name: Longbowman
flavor: Realms at War — death from afar. Medieval counterpart of the Sniper; the Longbow die behaves like the Sniper die.

specialAction.name: Longbow Volley
specialAction.summary: Make an Attack on a valid target and add the Longbow die to the Attack dice. Its good faces add hits; on a snapped-string face you take a Wound (+2 or +1) yourself. The Longbow die re-rolls like the others but can never be modified.

effects.text: Add the Longbow die (Sniper-die analog) to the Attack pool.
Snapped-string faces add +2 or +1 Wound to the Longbowman.

specialAbility.summary: For each Lightning, place 1 Exposed token on the target after your Attack (lowering its Armour).
